---
name: Feature Request / 功能请求
about: Suggest an idea for this project
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Is Your Feature Request Related to a Problem? / 该功能请求是否与某个问题相关？

<!-- A clear and concise description of what the problem is. Ex. I'm always frustrated when [...] -->
<!-- 清晰简洁地描述你遇到的问题。例如：当 [...] 时，我总是很困扰。 -->

## Describe the Solution You'd Like / 描述你想要的解决方案

<!-- A clear and concise description of what you want to happen. -->
<!-- 清晰简洁地描述你期望发生什么。 -->

## Describe Alternatives / 你考虑过的替代方案

<!-- A clear and concise description of any alternative solutions or features you've considered. -->
<!-- 清晰简洁地描述你考虑过的任何替代方案或功能。 -->

## How Does This Benefit Users? / 这对用户有何帮助？

<!-- Explain why this feature would be useful to other users of ETB Save Manager. -->
<!-- 解释为什么这个功能对 ETB Save Manager 的其他用户有用。 -->

## Game Update Context (If Applicable) / 游戏更新背景（如适用）

<!-- If this feature is related to a new Escape The Backrooms update, please specify which version/update. -->
<!-- 如果该功能与 Escape The Backrooms 的新版本更新有关，请注明是哪次更新。 -->

## Additional Context / 补充说明

<!-- Add any other context or screenshots about the feature request here. -->
<!-- 在此添加其他背景信息或功能相关的截图。 -->
